text_block_list.text:
The plan for Narita Taishin was to<n>have a dance
lesson so she could<n>prepare for her winning
concerts,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Winning concerts, huh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's not it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm just not the type of racer that<n>wants to show
gratitude to my fans<n>or thank them for supporting
me like<n>the others do.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: The only person I race for is myself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Even those concerts... I just don't<n>know...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But whatever—I'll do it if I have to.<n>What's the
song today?

Although Narita Taishin looks<n>conflicted about the
whole thing, we<n>finally get the lesson started.

Narita Taishin sings and dances with<n>a skill that
belies her lackluster<n>attitude, making it almost
seem like an<n>act!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Phew.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hello? Could you say something<n>instead of
spacing out? The song's<n>over.
choice_data_list: I think I'm tearing up. That was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh... You're getting way too excited.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I just don't want people to be like,<n>"Oh wow, she
won a race, but she<n>can't even dance and sing
properly<n>for us?"

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's not anything spe—
choice_data_list: Now I want to dance too!
Now I want to dance too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's not anything spe—
choice_data_list: Now I want to dance too!
Now I want to dance too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, cut it out already!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Just gimme some pointers about<n>what I need to
improve! You're my<n>trainer, so do your job and
help me<n>train!
...It appears I've embarrassed her too<n>much.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin, Taishin! Whatcha reading?<n>News about a
new game?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Butt out.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, a dancing game where you<n>move your whole
body? You usually<n>play mobile games, so I'm
surprised<n>you're interested in this one!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I said, butt out!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? The heck are you talking about?

She looks unimpressed with me, but I<n>can't sit
still. My body begins to<n>move to the beat on its
own.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa... Hey, stop! Seriously, what are<n>you doing?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Look at you—you have absolutely no<n>sense of
rhythm.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Listen to the song more carefully...

I don't know when our<n>trainer-student roles
reversed, but<n>regardless, we end up having a fun
day together.
